# EVOLA

> EVOLA rents electric bikes (e-bikes) and spare batteries in Wroclaw, Poland, and converts standard bicycles into electric ones. Rental periods start at 1 week, with bike service included twice a week.

EVOLA offers two e-bike models for weekly rental (full suspension and hardtail, both with 30Ah batteries), standalone battery rentals (20-35Ah), custom e-bike conversion/build services, and ready-made e-bike kits (250W-3000W). The site is available in three languages by path: Russian at `/` (default), English at `/en`, and Polish at `/pl`.

## Site (Russian, default)
- [Главная — Аренда электровелосипедов](https://evola.pl/): Hero, pricing, comparison, benefits, conversion offer, and FAQ.
- [Аренда](https://evola.pl/rent): Full rental landing page.
- [Батареи](https://evola.pl/batteries): Standalone battery rental, specs, and pricing.
- [Электрокомплекты](https://evola.pl/kits): E-bike conversion kits (LITE 250W, BASE 500W, TURBO 3000W).

## Site (English)
- [Home — Electric bike rental](https://evola.pl/en): Hero, pricing, comparison, benefits, conversion offer, and FAQ.
- [Rent](https://evola.pl/en/rent): Full rental landing page.
- [Batteries](https://evola.pl/en/batteries): Standalone battery rental, specs, and pricing.
- [Kits](https://evola.pl/en/kits): E-bike conversion kits (LITE 250W, BASE 500W, TURBO 3000W).

## Site (Polish)
- [Strona główna — Wynajem rowerów elektrycznych](https://evola.pl/pl): Hero, pricing, comparison, benefits, conversion offer, and FAQ.
- [Wynajem](https://evola.pl/pl/rent): Full rental landing page.
- [Baterie](https://evola.pl/pl/batteries): Standalone battery rental, specs, and pricing.
- [Zestawy](https://evola.pl/pl/kits): E-bike conversion kits (LITE 250W, BASE 500W, TURBO 3000W).
